title: Shared types for AI stage I/O contracts
description: Common building blocks referenced by every stage schema. Custom annotations: x-harvested marks fields whose value MUST appear in the per-job harvest allowlist (enforced by the runtime validator, not the schema itself, so schemas stay static while allowlists vary per job).

HexColor.description: Lowercase or uppercase hex color, 6 digits opaque or 8 digits with alpha. AI MUST NOT invent values — only reference harvested ones.

TokenPath.description: Dotted token path from the harvest, e.g. 'colors.brand.primary' or 'typography.display'. AI MUST reference an existing path; never invent a new one.

ProbeId.description: Opaque identifier of a harvested probe (a single (selector, pseudo-state) capture). Issued by the deterministic harvest; AI may only reference, never mint.

Selector.description: CSS selector string, free-form but bounded. Should match a node observed by the harvest.

Confidence.description: Self-rated confidence 0..1. <0.7 fields are downgraded to 'fallback' provenance during emission.

Viewport.description: One of the four canonical viewports captured by Phase 6.2 multi-viewport harvest.

Rationale.description: Short justification for an AI judgment — why this name, why this confidence. Surfaced in the live preview's hover panel.

DisplayName.description: Human-readable name (e.g. 'Magenta Promo'). No emoji, no leading punctuation, length-bounded to keep the preview tidy.

TokenName.description: Lowercase kebab-case token slug, e.g. 'block-promo-magenta'. Used as the leaf of a token path.

Stage.description: Canonical name of an AI stage. Used in the provenance sidecar's source field as 'llm-<stage>'.

Envelope.description: Wrapper added by the stage runner around every stage's `data` payload. Validators check the envelope; schema files describe only the inner payload.
